name: getVideoFromText
description: Generate a brand-new short video from a text description using Replicate (Google Veo 3). Always generate fresh — never reuse video URLs from previous calls. Use this ONLY for generating video from text with no source image.

prompt.description: Describe the video scene to generate from scratch.

videoModel.description: Override model version (defaults to toolsconfig.getVideoFromText.videoModel, e.g. 'google/veo-3').

videoPollIntervalMs.description: Override poll interval in ms (defaults to toolsconfig.getVideoFromText.videoPollIntervalMs).

videoPublicBaseUrl.description: Override public base URL for saved files (defaults to toolsconfig.getVideoFromText.videoPublicBaseUrl).
